class_prompt: a documentary photo of a fresh rockfall blocking a mountain road, irregular natural boulders and fractured stones covering asphalt lanes, muddy gravel and soil, visible lane markings, steep rocky slope or forested hillside source, realistic overcast disaster scene
negative_prompt: clean empty road, no rockfall, rocks only on roadside or hillside, decorative stones, cones, road signs, people, workers, vehicles, excavators, saturated or neon colors, sunset, cinematic lighting, cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, 3d render, CGI, blurry, low quality, text, watermark
